scenario_ref: HBSYNC-02 (concave-PCO converges N>=3) — field.* corroboration on the WiFi transport axis
runner: hive; 3 alfred XIAO ESP32-S3, default (non-ble) WiFi build, X1=SoftAP via AP_MAC_MATCH=0xXXXXXX, X2/X3=STA, local serial capture
topology: WiFi SoftAP star (single broadcast domain), UDP broadcast to 192.168.4.255 — L0 full mesh, N=3
method: the SAME leaderless Mirollo-Strogatz PCO engine (R2-HEARTBEAT v0.4) that runs over ESP-NOW, carried over WiFi/UDP-broadcast instead. AP_MAC_MATCH flipped to a XIAO so the span runs on XIAO (DFR ESP-NOW demo untouched).

expectations.observed: both STAs (X2,X3) associated to the SoftAP + DHCP'd (.4.68, .4.140) + UDP-broadcast HBs; X1(AP) receives HB<- from both
leaderless PCO CONVERGED over WiFi/UDP: phase error e->~0.000, spread_ms 46->0-4ms, synced=true across all 3 boards

notes: SURVIVED — HBSYNC-02 (concave Mirollo-Strogatz PCO converges for N>=3) holds on the WiFi/UDP TRANSPORT, corroborating the ESP-NOW result: same r2-heartbeat engine, e->~0.000, spread_ms 46->0-4ms, N=3, synced=true. Per specs canon, transport is an AXIS on the existing conjecture (NOT a new delivery-matrix id) -> filed as HBSYNC-02 field.* transport=wifi. Convergence now metal-confirmed on BOTH ESP-NOW (HBSYNC-01/02 rig) + WiFi = the transport axis filling for sync. Banks the WiFi leg of HBSYNC-07; cross-transport coherence (LoRa<->WiFi, one logical clock across different periods) pending the combined run. Method: SoftAP star on XIAO (X1=AP via AP_MAC_MATCH flip, DFR demo untouched), UDP .4.255 broadcast. Minor (cosmetic): WiFi-path nbrs telemetry stays 0 (seen-push ESP-NOW-gated); sync unaffected.
canonical_filing: HBSYNC-02.result.hardware (transport=wifi); also banks the WiFi LEG of HBSYNC-07 (multi-transport) — the FULL HBSYNC-07 cross-transport LoRa<->WiFi coherence (different periods, one logical clock) still needs the COMBINED LoRa+WiFi run (DG-2 gateway).
